---
title: "College Basketball Report"
subtitle: "Data-driven analysis of NCAA and NBA basketball"
---

Welcome to the **College Basketball Report** — a stats-first blog covering NCAA and NBA basketball through the lens of data. Every post digs into the numbers behind the game: shooting trends, team efficiency, player breakdowns, and season-long narratives told through visualizations.

## What You'll Find Here

| Section | Description |
|---|---|
| **Duke Blue Devils** | 2025–26 season breakdown — shooting, scoring, and ball movement |
| **NBA Stats & Win %** | How team statistics translate to wins in the NBA |

## About This Project

All analysis is built in R using real game-by-game data from ESPN. Charts are created with `ggplot2` and the site is rendered with [Quarto](https://quarto.org). The data pipeline lives in a separate R project and feeds directly into these pages.

> Every number tells a story. This blog is about finding it.
